title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about systemic patterns underlying Renaissance judicial trials. The discussion explores hidden structures and institutional mechanisms that shaped trial outcomes during the Renaissance period.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about the systemic patterns that shaped judicial trials during the Renaissance. The conversation focuses on the hidden structures and institutional mechanisms that influenced trial outcomes rather than the individual cases alone. It matters because it frames Renaissance justice as the product of recurring institutional design, not isolated verdicts.
